overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban plaza at night. The player moves from a dark alley into an open commercial area with outdoor seating, past various shops and advertisements, and up to an upper level with a colorful glass bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with neon advertisements and steam vents

events.description: emerging from dark alley into brightly lit open plaza
passing pedestrian with purple hair walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza approaching the outdoor seating area with blue umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and green shirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard with pink and red advertisement graphics
industrial steam vents releasing white vapor into the air
modern yellow benches with metallic frames lining the walkway
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the background
large rectangular planters with spiky vegetation

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from a dark alley into a neon-lit urban plaza. Large pink billboards and steam vents dominate the background while yellow benches line the right side. A pedestrian with distinctive purple hair passes by as the player walks toward an outdoor dining area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with blue umbrellas and seated patrons

events.description: entering outdoor dining area with large blue umbrellas
passing close under blue umbrella temporarily obscuring upper view

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor dining area passing seated patrons at tables

notable_agents.action: seated at table under blue umbrella facing the camera
seated with back to camera wearing red tank top and blonde hair

entered.detail: large blue patio umbrellas with yellow text shading outdoor tables
modern building with reflective glass windows and signage
raised platform with tables and chairs under umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The player enters an outdoor dining area shaded by large blue umbrellas. Several NPCs are seated at tables, including one in a red tank top with their back to the camera. The area is surrounded by modern glass buildings with neon signage, creating a semi-enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with shops and concrete stairs

events.description: exiting covered dining area into narrower commercial walkway
turning right to approach staircase leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: turning right past Masala Studios and approaching the concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: walking up the concrete stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading 'MASALA STUDIOS' in white letters
small food vendor stall with graffiti on the side
wide concrete staircase leading up to upper plaza level
large wall painting of a skull with red floral decorations
red and white striped barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dining area into a narrower commercial walkway lined with construction barriers. The camera turns right past Masala Studios and a food stall kiosk, approaching a wide concrete staircase. A distinctive skull mural is painted on the wall to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level plaza with colorful glass bridge and food stalls

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs to upper plaza level
emerging from stairs into upper plaza with colorful illuminated glass bridge

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs and walking through upper plaza with various pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: walking through plaza wearing distinctive outfit with pink leg warmers

entered.detail: elevated walkway with colorful stained glass panels illuminated from within
curved orange and black building facade with industrial details
open pedestrian area on upper level with various storefronts
massive digital screens displaying advertisements including 'Set Sail' text

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the concrete stairs and emerges into an upper plaza featuring a striking colorful glass bridge structure. The area contains food stalls, curved orange architecture, and large digital billboards. Several pedestrians are walking through or standing near the stalls as the player explores the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim urban alleyway into a vibrant, multi-level commercial plaza. It begins by emerging from the shadows into a neon-lit square dominated by pink billboards and steam vents, passing a purple-haired pedestrian and yellow benches. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-enclosed outdoor dining area shaded by large blue umbrellas and surrounded by glowing glass buildings. The path then narrows into a commercial walkway lined with construction barriers and a skull mural, passing a food kiosk before turning toward a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs to reveal an expansive upper plaza featuring curved orange architecture, digital billboards, and a striking colorful glass bridge.
